system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.rpt_tonghop_vattu_muahang","body":"
CREATE PROC RPT_TONGHOP_VATTU_MUAHANG
(
    @BEGINDATE DATE,
    @ENDDATE DATE,
    @MAVT NVARCHAR(200)
)
AS

--DECLARE @BEGINDATE DATE = CAST('2020-08-01' AS DATE)
--DECLARE @ENDDATE DATE = CAST('2020-08-22' AS DATE)
SELECT B.mavt, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac, B.dvt
    , SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong
    , SUM(A.sl_danhan) AS sl_danhan
    , SUM(A.thanhtien) AS thanhtien
INTO #DONDATHANG
FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet A, tr_material B
WHERE A.chitiet = B.idxuong
    AND A.active = 1
    AND CAST(A.create_date AS DATE) BETWEEN @BEGINDATE AND @ENDDATE
GROUP BY B.mavt, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac, B.dvt

SELECT B.mact, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt 
    , SUM(B.soluong) AS soluong_xuat
INTO #XUATKHO
FROM tr_phieuxuat A, tr_ctphieuxuat B, tr_material C
WHERE A.sopx = B.phieuxuat
    AND B.mact = C.idxuong
    AND A.active = 1
    AND CAST(A.ngaytao AS DATE) BETWEEN @BEGINDATE AND @ENDDATE
GROUP BY B.mact, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt 

SELECT mavt, SUM(soluong) AS soluong 
INTO #TONKHO
FROM tr_tonkho_sum WITH(NOLOCK)
GROUP BY mavt

IF (@MAVT = '' OR @MAVT IS NULL)
BEGIN
    SELECT A.mavt, A.mota, A.quycach, A.mausac, A.dvt
	   , A.soluong AS soluong_dat
	   , A.sl_danhan AS soluong_danhan
	   , A.thanhtien
	   , ISNULL(B.soluong_xuat, 0) AS soluong_xuat
	   , ISNULL(C.soluong, 0) AS soluong_tonkho
    FROM #DONDATHANG A
	   LEFT JOIN #XUATKHO B ON A.mavt = B.mact
	   LEFT JOIN #TONKHO C ON A.mavt = C.mavt
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    SELECT A.mavt, A.mota, A.quycach, A.mausac, A.dvt
	   , A.soluong AS soluong_dat
	   , A.sl_danhan AS soluong_danhan
	   , A.thanhtien
	   , ISNULL(B.soluong_xuat, 0) AS soluong_xuat
	   , ISNULL(C.soluong, 0) AS soluong_tonkho
    FROM #DONDATHANG A
	   LEFT JOIN #XUATKHO B ON A.mavt = B.mact
	   LEFT JOIN #TONKHO C ON A.mavt = C.mavt
    WHERE A.mavt = @MAVT
END

DROP TABLE #DONDATHANG
DROP TABLE #XUATKHO
DROP TABLE #TONKHO","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
